summary: Completed testing of four new features in Lees is Duidelik app: AI Afrikaans TTS Demo, OCR Letter Extraction, Logo Update, and Woordbou Challenge. Backend APIs for TTS demo working correctly, logo display successful, but encountered frontend admin dashboard session issues preventing full UI testing of TTS and OCR features.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 404 when accessed with admin token - may need specific data setup
minor_issues.impact: Leaderboard functionality may need data seeding

ui_bugs.issue: Admin session not maintaining properly - redirects back to login page

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access Instellings and Woordbou tabs to verify TTS Demo UI and OCR UI

passed_tests: Logo display on landing page - NEW FEATURE WORKING
Logo display in footer - NEW FEATURE WORKING

TTS Demo API - POST /api/tts/demo generates audio successfully - NEW FEATURE WORKING
TTS voices functionality (alloy voice tested) - NEW FEATURE WORKING
Woordbou CRUD operations (create, read, update) working
Klanktoets CRUD operations (create, read, update) working
Woordbou stats API structure verified (/api/woordbou/my-stats requires auth)
Landing page navigation and user experience
Admin authentication flow via backend API
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin dashboard session management - admin login succeeds via API but frontend admin dashboard redirects back to login page, preventing testing of TTS Demo UI in Instellings tab and OCR functionality in Woordbou tab

success_percentage.backend: 85% (New TTS demo API working, leaderboard needs data setup)
success_percentage.frontend: 60% (Logo update working, admin dashboard navigation issues prevent full testing)
